mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ad_materials ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT m.account_id AS accountId, MAX(IFNULL(a.account_name, '')) AS accountName, MAX(IFNULL(a.subject_name, '')) AS subjectName, COUNT(*) AS materialCount FROM ad_materials m LEFT JOIN ad_accounts a ON a.account_id = m.account_id WHERE IFNULL(m.account_id, '') != '' GROUP BY m.account_id ORDER BY m.account_id ASC
SELECT * FROM ad_materials WHERE material_id = #{materialId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE ad_materials SET material_name = #{materialName}, type = #{type}, entity_name = #{entityName}, account_id = #{accountId}, video_id = #{videoId}, cover_url = #{coverUrl}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
